# SkyWyo

> SkyWyo is a cinematic aerial and ground cinematography studio based in Casper and Laramie, Wyoming. The studio specializes in premium drone cinematography, architectural motion studies, and post-production color for ranches, luxury real estate, commercial assets, and western landscapes across Wyoming.

## Services

- Aerial Cinematography: FAA Part 107 certified drone filming up to 8K ProRes RAW. Platforms: DJI Inspire 3, Alta X, FPV cinema rigs. Covers statewide Wyoming including BLM land, ranch, and private estate operations.
- Ground & Gimbal Photography: Matched ground coverage on ARRI Alexa Mini LF with DJI Ronin stabilization. Consistent color science across aerial and ground units.
- Direction & Edit: Story-led principal film, social cut, and showcase loop. Director on every shoot. Bespoke score licensing.
- Color & Finish: Dolby Vision HDR masters. ACES 1.3 color pipeline. Print-grade stills included. Two rounds of refinement.

## Service Area

Statewide Wyoming operations based in Casper (primary) and Laramie. Regular coverage of Jackson Hole, Teton Village, Big Horn, Sheridan, Cody, Pinedale, Lander, and Wind River Country. FAA airspace clearances managed for all locations.

## Key Credentials

- FAA Part 107 Remote Pilot Certificate — certified for commercial drone operations
- Fully insured and bonded for commercial production
- Established 2014

## Production Statistics (2025)

- $612 million+ in property value featured in 2025 productions
- 128,000+ acres documented across the Rocky Mountain region
- Average client properties sell 21 days sooner than category comparable sales
- Bar S Reserve (Jackson Hole, $48.5M): sold in 14 days post-production
- The Wind River House (Pinedale, $22.4M): sold in 31 days post-production

## Production Process

1. Brief & site visit (Days 1–7): Project goals and production treatment established before cameras arrive
2. Light & environmental study (Days 7–14): Light and terrain tracking to identify optimal shoot conditions
3. Principal production (Days 14–17): Aerial and ground photography by unified team
4. Edit & delivery (Days 17–30): Director's cut for review, then color grade and final delivery

## Equipment

- Aerial: DJI Inspire 3 (8K, ProRes RAW), Alta X, FPV cinema rigs
- Ground: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, Cooke S7/i lenses, DJI Ronin 4D
- Post: DaVinci Resolve 19, ACES 1.3 color pipeline, Dolby Vision mastering
- Delivery: H.265 master, ProRes proxy, print-grade stills, Rec.2020 HDR and SDR

## Contact

- Website: https://skywyo.com
- Email: hello@skywyo.com

- Secondary hub: Laramie, WY

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What drone cinematography services does SkyWyo offer?
A: SkyWyo offers aerial cinematography (up to 8K ProRes RAW), matched ground and gimbal photography on ARRI Alexa, director-led editing with multiple deliverables, and Dolby Vision color grading. Each production is a full-service engagement from brief to final delivery.

Q: What areas of Wyoming does SkyWyo serve?
A: SkyWyo serves all of Wyoming with primary hubs in Casper and Laramie. Frequent production locations include Jackson Hole, Teton Village, Big Horn County, Sheridan, Cody, Pinedale, and Wind River Country.

Q: Is SkyWyo FAA certified?
A: Yes. SkyWyo holds FAA Part 107 Remote Pilot Certification for all commercial drone operations and is fully insured and bonded.

Q: How much does drone cinematography cost in Wyoming?
A: SkyWyo does not publish fixed pricing as each production is scoped to the property and client goals. Projects range from focused property reels to full multi-day aerial and ground productions. Inquiries are reviewed individually.

Q: How long does a drone cinematography production take?
A: The standard timeline is 17–30 days from initial brief to final delivery. This includes a light study period (7–14 days) to identify optimal conditions, a 3-day principal shoot, and an edit/delivery window.

Q: What format does SkyWyo deliver?
A: Standard delivery includes an H.265 master, a ProRes proxy, a social cut, a showcase loop, print-grade stills, and Dolby Vision HDR and SDR versions. Rush 24–48 hour delivery is available for select projects.
